a: The configuration for this device.
The object you use to observe changes to the current configuration.
The object you use to delete web-usage data.
An identifier representing a web history profile.
The controller you use to report web usage and block restricted webpages.
Share and manage web-usage data, and observe changes made by a parent or guardian.
The configuration being observed.
Deletes all web history associated with the bundle identifier you specified during initialization.
Deletes web history that occurred during the date interval you specify.
Deletes all the web history for the URL you specify.
A Boolean that indicates whether the device is currently enforcing child restrictions.
Fetches all web history associated with the bundle identifier and profile identifier you specified during initialization.
Fetches web history that occurred during the date interval you specify.
Creates a web history instance to delete web-usage data associated to the bundle identifier you specify.
Creates a web history instance to delete web-usage data associated to the bundle identifier and profile identifier you specify.
Creates a web history instance to delete web-usage data associated to the profile identifier you specify.
Creates a configuration observer that reports updates on the queue you specify.
An optional identifier for the current browsing profile.
Changes the bundle identifier used to report web usage.
Starts observing changes to the current configuration.
Stops observing changes to the current configuration.
A Boolean that indicates whether the webpage controller is not recording web usage.
The URL for the webpage.
A Boolean that indicates whether a parent or guardian has blocked the URL.
A Boolean that indicates whether the webpage is currently displaying a floating picture in picture window.
A Boolean that indicates whether there are one or more videos currently playing in the webpage.
